name: Perfin Apollo Energia Fundo De Investimento Em Participacoes Em Infraestrutura
summary: Perfin Apollo Energia Fundo De Investimento Em Participacoes Em Infraestrutura is a Brazilian investment fund focused on infrastructure projects in the energy sector. The fund invests in companies involved in power generation, transmission, and distribution. PFIN11 aims to provide investors with exposure to the growing infrastructure needs of the Brazilian energy market.
